'''鈭歞-z-b''' ('''kadazab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:questionnaire|questionnaire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:questionnaire|questionnaire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadazab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazab|thidazab]] || [[word:jidazab|jidazab]] || [[word:shidazab|shidazab]] || [[word:kidazab|kidazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazab|thuthudazab]] || [[word:jujudazab|jujudazab]] || [[word:shushudazab|shushudazab]] || [[word:kukudazab|kukudazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazab|thudazab]] || [[word:judazab|judazab]] || [[word:shudazab|shudazab]] || [[word:kudazab|kudazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazab|thudazab]] || [[word:judazab|judazab]] || [[word:shudazab|shudazab]] || [[word:kudazab|kudazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazab|thedazab]] || [[word:jedazab|jedazab]] || [[word:shedazab|shedazab]] || [[word:kedazab|kedazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazab|thothodazab]] || [[word:jojodazab|jojodazab]] || [[word:shoshodazab|shoshodazab]] || [[word:kokodazab|kokodazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazab|thodazab]] || [[word:jodazab|jodazab]] || [[word:shodazab|shodazab]] || [[word:kodazab|kodazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazab|thodazab]] || [[word:jodazab|jodazab]] || [[word:shodazab|shodazab]] || [[word:kodazab|kodazab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]] || [[word:dazab|dazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dazab|th忙dazab]] || [[word:j忙dazab|j忙dazab]] || [[word:sh忙dazab|sh忙dazab]] || [[word:k忙dazab|k忙dazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazab|thathadazab]] || [[word:jajadazab|jajadazab]] || [[word:shashadazab|shashadazab]] || [[word:kakadazab|kakadazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazab|thadazab]] || [[word:jadazab|jadazab]] || [[word:shadazab|shadazab]] || [[word:kadazab|kadazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazab|thadazab]] || [[word:jadazab|jadazab]] || [[word:shadazab|shadazab]] || [[word:kadazab|kadazab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadazab|shadazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadazab|goshadazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadazab|gokishadazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadazabn眉|shadazabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadazabnkn眉|goshadazabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazabn眉|gokishadazabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadazabsh毛|shadazabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadazabnksh毛|goshadazabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadazabsh毛|gokishadazabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazabro|shadazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazabnkro|goshadazabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazabro|gokishadazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazabmu|shadazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazabnkmu|goshadazabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazabmu|gokishadazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadazabsher|shadazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadazabnksher|goshadazabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadazabsher|gokishadazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadazabng|shadazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadazabnkng|goshadazabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadazabng|gokishadazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadazabya|shadazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadazabnkya|goshadazabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadazabya|gokishadazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadazabyam|shadazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadazabnkyam|goshadazabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadazabyam|gokishadazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazabn眉sh毛|shadazabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazabnkn眉sh毛|goshadazabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazabn眉sh毛|gokishadazabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazabn眉ro|shadazabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazabnkn眉ro|goshadazabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazabn眉ro|gokishadazabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazabn眉mu|shadazabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazabnkn眉mu|goshadazabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazabn眉mu|gokishadazabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazabsh毛n眉|shadazabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazabnksh毛n眉|goshadazabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazabsh毛n眉|gokishadazabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazabsh毛ro|shadazabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazabnksh毛ro|goshadazabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazabsh毛ro|gokishadazabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazabsh毛mu|shadazabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazabnksh毛mu|goshadazabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazabsh毛mu|gokishadazabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazabron眉|shadazabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazabnkron眉|goshadazabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazabron眉|gokishadazabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazabrosh毛|shadazabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazabnkrosh毛|goshadazabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazabrosh毛|gokishadazabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazabromu|shadazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazabnkromu|goshadazabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazabromu|gokishadazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazabmun眉|shadazabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazabnkmun眉|goshadazabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazabmun眉|gokishadazabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazabmush毛|shadazabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazabnkmush毛|goshadazabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazabmush毛|gokishadazabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazabmuro|shadazabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazabnkmuro|goshadazabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazabmuro|gokishadazabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
